last_commit: fb1a04a Complete: Add runner smoke test note

current_task.title: Add runtime branch and SQL summary safety guards
current_task.description: Update the LangGraph runner so tasks with branch main are blocked or rewritten to feature/<task-id>, and fix summary parsing so SQL Required: no is parsed as false. Add tests or simple validation where appropriate. Do not modify app UI.

worker_result.output:
---

**Files Created:** _(none)_

**Files Modified:**
- `runner/langgraph/graph.py`

**Check Result:** pass

**Commit Result:** `6362e91`

**Push Result:** done

**SQL Required:** no

**SQL File Path:** N/A

**Known Limitations:**
- Branch guard only applies at commit/push/merge time — a task with `"branch": "main"` still gets dispatched to the worker; the guard fires before git operations begin
- Guard covers `"main"` and `"master"` (case-insensitive); other protected branch names (e.g. `release/*`) are not guarded

**Next Task:**
- Add the branch guard earlier in the pipeline (e.g. in `load_next_task` or `choose_worker`) so invalid tasks are rejected before the worker runs
- Write unit tests for `commit_push_merge_if_needed` branch guard and `apply_sql_if_needed` event routing
